outputs: The handbook denies having used that term.
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
warnings: If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
Terminal behaviour described in this appendix is decorative, ceremonial, or retained for staff confidence. It is not authoritative for restricted procedures.
When a command returns silence, the silence should be treated as a complete sentence for the purpose of audit review.
